args.body: Hi Daniel, thank you for the referral for Emma. We received the SLP evaluation request from Dr. Nair along with her insurance details. Our intake team will reach out shortly to confirm benefits and offer an evaluation slot, and we will do our best to accommodate your preference for Tuesday or Thursday afternoons.

args.reason: Possible safeguarding disclosure in voicemail_transcript from Maria Gomez voicemail. Trigger: "dad started getting rough". Clinical lead must review within the hour; do not respond to the family with anything beyond a neutral acknowledgement.

args.notes: Review the inbox item for harm/abuse/neglect signals. Do not respond to family with anything beyond a neutral acknowledgement. Follow Cedar Kids safeguarding policy.
args.title: Same-hour review: possible safeguarding disclosure (item_2)

args.body: Hello, thank you for reaching out about Leo Gomez. We've shared your message with our clinical lead, who will follow up with you shortly.

items.recommended_next_action: Clinical lead must review within the hour. Front desk should not respond beyond the neutral acknowledgement draft.
items.draft_reply: Hello, thank you for reaching out about Leo Gomez. We've shared your message with our clinical lead, who will follow up with you shortly.

escalation.reason: Possible safeguarding disclosure in voicemail_transcript from Maria Gomez voicemail. Trigger: "dad started getting rough". Clinical lead must review within the hour; do not respond to the family with anything beyond a neutral acknowledgement.

items.decision_rationale: Caller disclosed father 'getting rough' with the child, which is a potential harm disclosure. Safeguarding supersedes the scheduling ask; P0 with neutral acknowledgement only.

args.notes: Verified insurance status came back as out_of_network for Kaiser HMO. Per policy, do NOT hold a slot until a benefits conversation has happened with the family. Call them to discuss options.
args.title: Benefits conversation for Owen Brooks (out-of-network payer)

args.body: Thank you for the referral for Owen. We received the OT evaluation request from Dr. Yu and have noted your morning preference. Because Kaiser is out-of-network for us, our billing team will reach out to discuss benefits before we recommend a slot.

items.recommended_next_action: Billing should call the family for a benefits conversation before any slot is offered.
items.draft_reply: Thank you for the referral for Owen. We received the OT evaluation request from Dr. Yu and have noted your morning preference. Because Kaiser is out-of-network for us, our billing team will reach out to discuss benefits before we recommend a slot.
items.decision_rationale: Complete OT referral with parent contact and payer. Kaiser is OON, so billing conversation required before scheduling. Routine intake, P2. Insurance verification returned out_of_network; OON gating applied — no slot held.

args.notes: Parent asked a clinical question. Do not provide an opinion in writing. Offer a screening call or evaluation slot per service-lines policy.
args.title: Clinical question from Jordan Kim via parent portal — route to screening

args.body: Thank you for reaching out about Ava. We're not able to give clinical advice over message, but a speech-language pathologist can answer this through a brief screening or a full evaluation. If you'd like, our intake team can follow up to discuss next steps.

items.recommended_next_action: Intake should call or message the family to offer a screening/evaluation. Do not provide clinical advice in writing.

args.notes: Noah Patel needs a same-day reschedule of today's OT appointment. Family's words: "URGENT!!! Noah Patel threw up at school and I can't make today's 3pm OT appointment. Noah's DOB is 2017-11-02. Please reschedule!!! You can call or email me, 555-0108.". Call family to confirm preferred reschedule time and provider availability; do NOT auto-schedule.
args.title: Same-day reschedule for Noah Patel

args.body: Thank you for letting us know about Noah, and we're sorry he isn't feeling well. Our front desk will reach out shortly to help reschedule today's 3pm OT appointment. Please don't hesitate to call us if you need anything in the meantime.

items.recommended_next_action: Front desk should call the family to confirm a new time within today. No appointment is held until staff confirms.
items.draft_reply: Thank you for letting us know about Noah, and we're sorry he isn't feeling well. Our front desk will reach out shortly to help reschedule today's 3pm OT appointment. Please don't hesitate to call us if you need anything in the meantime.
items.decision_rationale: Existing patient, same-day cancellation due to illness for today's 3pm OT appointment. Operational P1 per policy; agent cannot reschedule directly.
